channel.title: NPR Topics: Culture
channel.description: Art and entertainment commentary plus interviews, book reviews, movie reviews, music reviews, comedy, and visual art. Subscribe to podcasts and follow trends in music, painting, art, architecture, photography, and design.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Trump touts newly released plans for D.C. triumphal arch
item.description: The proposed 250-feet-tall, white-and-gilded monument would stand on the National Mall in Washington, D.C., by the Potomac River.
item.content:encoded:
The proposed 250-feet-tall, white-and-gilded monument would stand on the National Mall in Washington, D.C., by the Potomac River.

(Image credit: Jon Elswick)
item.dc:creator: Chloe Veltman

item.title: 'Wait Wait' for April 11, 2026: Spring has sprung!
item.description: This week, we're on Spring Break with special guests Rhea Seehorn, Andy Richter, Delroy Lindo, and Jon M. Chu
item.content:encoded:
This week, we're on Spring Break with special guests Rhea Seehorn, Andy Richter, Delroy Lindo, and Jon M. Chu

(Image credit: Amy Sussman)

item.title: Gut troubles? This gastroenterologist has tips to help you achieve 'poophoria'
item.description: In her new book You've Been Pooping All Wrong, Dr. Trisha Pasricha shares habits and practices to make your relationship with your solid waste as smooth as possible
item.content:encoded: In her new book You've Been Pooping All Wrong, Dr. Trisha Pasricha shares habits and practices to make your relationship with your solid waste as smooth as possible
item.dc:creator: Andrea Muraskin

item.title: Shortlisted for an Oscar, 'Homebound' is a daring movie about two dear friends
item.description: The movie, now streaming on Netflix, defied current trends in Indian cinema to tell the true story of a friendship between a Muslim and a Hindu Dalit. Martin Scorsese was secretly involved.
item.content:encoded:
The movie, now streaming on Netflix, defied current trends in Indian cinema to tell the true story of a friendship between a Muslim and a Hindu Dalit. Martin Scorsese was secretly involved.

(Image credit: Diaa Hadid/NPR)
item.dc:creator: Diaa Hadid

item.title: In Steven Soderbergh's 'The Christophers,' an aging artist meets his match
item.description: The newest movie from director Steven Soderbergh, whose films range from Erin Brockovich to Magic Mike and the spy thriller Black Bag, is about artistic legacy itself.
item.content:encoded:
The newest movie from director Steven Soderbergh, whose films range from Erin Brockovich to Magic Mike and the spy thriller Black Bag, is about artistic legacy itself.

(Image credit: Claudette Barius)
item.dc:creator: Bob Mondello

item.title: Move over, Mr. Ripley. 'I Am Agatha' is a delightfully duplicitous debut
item.description: Nancy Foley's deviously-plotted novel centers on an aging artist in New Mexico. Brutally dismissive of anyone who disagrees with her, Agatha is a perfectly engaging (if unreliable) narrator.
item.content:encoded: Nancy Foley's deviously-plotted novel centers on an aging artist in New Mexico. Brutally dismissive of anyone who disagrees with her, Agatha is a perfectly engaging (if unreliable) narrator.
item.dc:creator: Maureen Corrigan

item.title: The comic chemistry remains strong in Hulu's 'Malcolm in the Middle' reunion
item.description: Almost all the original cast return for a four-episode plot that centers on Hal and Lois' 40th-wedding-anniversary party. Malcolm in the Middle: Life's Still Unfair is full of laughs and surprises.
item.content:encoded: Almost all the original cast return for a four-episode plot that centers on Hal and Lois' 40th-wedding-anniversary party. Malcolm in the Middle: Life's Still Unfair is full of laughs and surprises.
item.dc:creator: David Bianculli

item.title: Afrika Bambaataa, hip-hop and electro pioneer, dead at 68
item.description: The rapper and producer helped script hip-hop and electronic music's blueprint with songs like "Planet Rock" and "Looking for the Perfect Beat."
item.content:encoded:
The rapper and producer helped script hip-hop and electronic music's blueprint with songs like "Planet Rock" and "Looking for the Perfect Beat."

(Image credit: Henny Ray Abrams)
item.dc:creator: Isabella Gomez Sarmiento

item.title: Why Pokemon cards are one of the hottest speculative booms right now
item.description: If you collected Pokemon cards as a kid, here's hoping you held onto them. The Japanese franchise has been popular for decades, but it's become the latest speculative boom.
item.content:encoded: If you collected Pokemon cards as a kid, here's hoping you held onto them. The Japanese franchise has been popular for decades, but it's become the latest speculative boom.
item.dc:creator: Ricky Mulvey

item.title: Actor Tim Blake Nelson feels like he's running out of time to do everything he wants
item.description: On Wild Card, well-known guests answer the kinds of questions we often think about but don't talk about. Tim Blake Nelson talks about feeling like he's running out of time to do the things he wants.
item.content:encoded: On Wild Card, well-known guests answer the kinds of questions we often think about but don't talk about. Tim Blake Nelson talks about feeling like he's running out of time to do the things he wants.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Martin
